zh.lifeSummary: 當Gebhard III. von Sulzbach於1105年出生在德國貝也素爾茲巴賀時，他的父親Berengar II. von Sulzbach26歲，母親Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen22歲。他與Mathilde von Bayern在德國結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1188年10月23日在他的家鄉享年83歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gebhard III. von Sulzbach于1105年出生在德国貝也素爾茲巴賀时，他的父亲Berengar II. von Sulzbach26岁，母亲Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen22岁。他与Mathilde von Bayern在德国结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1188年10月23日在他的家乡享年83岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sulzbach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Horst.
German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of the many places called Sulzbach.

nameMeanings.name: Gebhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from geb, gib ‘gift’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. St Gebhard was a 10th-century bishop of Constance who founded the abbey of Petershausen.

variants.name: Gebbert
meanings: from geb, gib ‘gift’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. St Gebhard was a 10th-century bishop of Constance who founded the abbey of Petershausen.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gebhard III. von Sulzbach was born in 1105, in Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Berengar II. von Sulzbach, was 26 and his mother, Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, was 22. He married Mathilde von Bayern in Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 23 October 1188, in his hometown, at the age of 83, and was buried in Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gebhard III. von Sulzbach est né en 1105, à Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Berengar II. von Sulzbach, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Bayern à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 octobre 1188, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gebhard III. von Sulzbach 1105 in Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Berengar II. von Sulzbach 26 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen 22. Er hat in Deutschland Mathilde von Bayern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Oktober 1188 im Alter von 83 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gebhard III. von Sulzbach è nato il nel 1105 nel Sulzbach, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Berengar II. von Sulzbach, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde von Bayern nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 23 ottobre 1188, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Gebhard III. von Sulzbachが1105年にドイツバイエルンスルズバチで生まれた時，父Berengar II. von Sulzbachは26歳，母Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießenは22歳であった。ドイツでMathilde von Bayernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1188年10月23日に故郷で83歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンバーグ-スルズバチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gebhard III. von Sulzbach(이)가 1105년 독일 베이른 설즈바치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Berengar II. von Sulzbach(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen(은)는 22세였다. 그는 독일에서 Mathilde von Bayern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1188년 10월 23일 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gebhard III. von Sulzbach nasceu em 1105, em Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Berengar II. von Sulzbach, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde von Bayern em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1188, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gebhard III. von Sulzbach родился в 1105 г. в местности сулзбач, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Berengar II. von Sulzbach было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Bayern в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 23 октября 1188 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gebhard III. von Sulzbach nació en 1105, en Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Berengar II. von Sulzbach, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mathilde von Bayern en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1188, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemania.
